The mission
SpirituallyMentallyPhysically

At Kingdom Training, we develop athletes by building strong character, unwavering faith, and elite football skills. Through intentional coaching, disciplined training, and Christ-centered mentorship, we equip athletes to maximize their God-given potential on the field, in the classroom, and in life — leaders who compete with excellence, serve with humility, and represent the Kingdom in everything they do.

Kingdom Training LLC
What we offer

Train the whole athlete

Position skill, film IQ, and faith — coached with the same intensity. Pick the room that fits where you are.

01

Private Training

One-on-one work built around your position, your tape, and your goals. Every rep has a purpose.

02

Group Training

Small-group sessions that sharpen technique and tempo while building real brotherhood.

03

Team Training

Youth and college units trained together — install to execution, with standards that carry to game day.

04

Film Study

Break down your tape like a pro: get-off, leverage, hand placement, and the details that win downs.

05

Bible Study

Train the spirit. Scripture, accountability, and identity that hold up long after the whistle.

06

Mentorship

Guidance through recruiting, the next level, and life decisions — from someone who has walked it.

07

Merch

Wear the mission. Kingdom Training gear that reps faith and the grind.Coming soon

NY Jets · NFL
UFL Maulers · #98
The coach

From the trenches to the Kingdom

Savion Williams played defensive line in the SEC at Tennessee and in the NFL with the New York Jets — the kind of rooms most athletes only dream about.

That road started as a high-school state champion and the nation’s #1 JUCO defensive tackle, ran through an All-American season at Florida A&M, and continued to a UFL Championship Game run with the Pittsburgh Maulers. Now he pours that experience into the next generation — coaching the technique that gets athletes seen, and the faith that keeps them grounded once they are.

“I train athletes to win in the trenches and to stand for something bigger than the game.”
SEC Tennessee NFL NY Jets All-American FAMU UFL Maulers State Champ Wise HS
The proof, passed on

Players he’s trained

From five-star recruits to Division I and HBCU starters — athletes Coach Savion has trained and developed on their way to the next level.

In the field

Coaching the next generation

The same standards that carried him to the league, taught rep by rep. Savion coaches and trains athletes from youth to high school — and was part of the St. Frances Academy staff that won the 2025 high-school national championship.

The proof

The path he’s walked

Every stop on this road is a lesson he now coaches — the standard, the grind, and the faith that carried it.
